creator: cs@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

Something is wrong with this submission. There is no MASTER_SITES entry, so the software is not fetched. Second, could you please submit a "diff -ruN old new > patch.txt" instead of the shar file (which is for new ports). So, its easier for us to see what diffs you have in the update.
